channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Y si sí: the phrase uniting Mexico during the World Cup
item.description: Mexico's World Cup run has inspired a phrase heard across the country: "Y si sí." Or in English: "What if we can?" Anamaria Sayre reports from Mexico City.
item.content:encoded: Mexico's World Cup run has inspired a phrase heard across the country: "Y si sí." Or in English: "What if we can?" Anamaria Sayre reports from Mexico City.
item.dc:creator: Anamaria Artemisa Sayre

item.title: Thunderstorms, heat and wind will hamper efforts to contain Colorado wildfires
item.description: Thunderstorms with high winds could make it more difficult to contain a massive wildfire that has scorched parts of southern Colorado.
item.content:encoded:
Thunderstorms with high winds could make it more difficult to contain a massive wildfire that has scorched parts of southern Colorado.

(Image credit: Michael Ciaglo)
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster

item.title: National Guard troops fatally shoot a man in downtown Memphis
item.description: Memphis police say National Guard troops fired their weapons in the early morning hours of July 5, killing a man who was armed with a handgun. State investigators will handle the case.
item.content:encoded:
Memphis police say National Guard troops fired their weapons in the early morning hours of July 5, killing a man who was armed with a handgun. State investigators will handle the case.

(Image credit: Brett Carlsen)
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: Folarin Balogun's ban is lifted by FIFA, allowing U.S. striker to play Belgium
item.description: In an unusual move, FIFA's Disciplinary Committee announced that it would delay Folarin Balogun's one-game red card ban. It came after President Trump spoke to FIFA President Gianni Infantino.
item.content:encoded:
In an unusual move, FIFA's Disciplinary Committee announced that it would delay Folarin Balogun's one-game red card ban. It came after President Trump spoke to FIFA President Gianni Infantino.

(Image credit: Julio Cortez)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: Super Typhoon Bavi brings intense winds to Guam and surrounding Pacific islands
item.description: People in the Northern Mariana Islands — remote U.S. territories in the Pacific Ocean — are dealing with intense winds and potential flooding from Super Typhoon Bavi.
item.content:encoded:
People in the Northern Mariana Islands — remote U.S. territories in the Pacific Ocean — are dealing with intense winds and potential flooding from Super Typhoon Bavi.

(Image credit: National Oceanic and Atmospheric)
item.dc:creator: Kristin Wright

item.title: Construction is a man's game. These women are demolishing the barriers
item.description: Women make up a miniscule 3% of construction workers in Kenya. But a nonprofit group is offering them a way to get into the game ... and to get ahead.
item.content:encoded:
Women make up a miniscule 3% of construction workers in Kenya. But a nonprofit group is offering them a way to get into the game ... and to get ahead.

(Image credit: Tommy Trenchard for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Christopher Clark

item.title: A new law in California will clarify 'sell by' dates to reduce food waste
item.description: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe speaks with Nick Lapis of Californians Against Waste about the new law that standardizes food label "use by" dates and how that reduces consumer confusion and tons of food waste.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe speaks with Nick Lapis of Californians Against Waste about the new law that standardizes food label "use by" dates and how that reduces consumer confusion and tons of food waste.
item.dc:creator: Ayesha Rascoe

item.title: Pennsylvania's proposed data centers are bringing strangers together in protest
item.description: Proposals to build six data centers in the small community of Archbald, Pennsylvania, have brought strangers together to fight the plans there — and elsewhere in the state.
item.content:encoded: Proposals to build six data centers in the small community of Archbald, Pennsylvania, have brought strangers together to fight the plans there — and elsewhere in the state.
item.dc:creator: Kat Bolus

item.title: Paul Pelosi in hit-and-run in California, car left with major damage, authorities say
item.description: The husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involved in a hit-and-run in California that left a parked car with "major" damage, authorities said Saturday.
item.content:encoded:
The husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involved in a hit-and-run in California that left a parked car with "major" damage, authorities said Saturday.

(Image credit: Adam Gray)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Pastor freed from prison in China weeks after Trump requested his release
item.description: A pastor of a prominent underground church who was detained in China in October has been released, less than two months after U.S. President Donald Trump brought up his case when meeting Chinese leader Xi Jinping.
item.content:encoded:
A pastor of a prominent underground church who was detained in China in October has been released, less than two months after U.S. President Donald Trump brought up his case when meeting Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

(Image credit: Ng Han Guan)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
